$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 mission spec AC #6 (content_class_declaration NEW field for D14). 1st canonical instance of D14 cycle JSON sub-shape — text-only-canonical-content with content_class_declaration + 5-lens overlay verification. Models on cycle_111_d12 (text-only-streamline) + cycle_118_d12 (single-file-binary-commit) precedents.

content_class_declaration.ceiling_band_rationale: README.md is the canonical-entry-point surface for the aDNA standard repo — first surface readers + agents hit on GitHub. Per M5.4 D12 lightweight AAR Finding, canonical-content surfaces sustain only 5-20% reduction before canonical-artifact preservation is at risk (load-bearing prose: elevator pitch, problem statement, Triad Question Test, persona table, FAQ, License). M5.0 §3 D14 target `<400 lines from 446` = ~10% which sits in 5-20% canonical band. This cycle targets ~15% (mid-band) to honor ceiling while utilizing room.

step_1_capture_state.target_surface: aDNA.aDNA/README.md (446 lines pre-cycle, post-M5.4 cycle 111 streamline 872 → 446 at commit 237704f)
step_1_capture_state.method: Read README.md full file + grep heading inventory + identify bloat hotspots per Agent B Explore-report at plan-mode + intra-vault anchor-link integrity inventory

bloat_hotspots_identified.rationale: newcomer reads prerequisites + 3 numbered steps as intimidating wall-of-text with narrative scaffolding ('The adna/ directory is the base template...', 'Alternatively, click...', 'Downloads 15 community plugins...'); essential procedural is ~12 lines + 3 install commands

agent-onboarding material (Agent Orientation + Session Tracking + Execution Hierarchy + Cross-Agent Coordination subsections) — newcomer first-contact is human-focused; agent protocol belongs in CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md per dual-audience SO #7
Governance files + Collision prevention + Compute tiers subsections — pure reference material that duplicates spec.md content; should link to spec instead
advanced ontology pattern; valuable but not first-contact — defer to spec or extending-ontology docs
Question Test is load-bearing for newcomer; intro paragraphs above + Two-deployment-forms + Governance-files are essential; not trimmed this cycle

anti_targets_preserve_verbatim: aDNA in 60 Seconds §17-24 (10 lines; core elevator pitch)
Who Is This For? §42-51 (13 lines; persona table)
The Triad Question Test §65-75 (16 lines; load-bearing classification primer)
License + Versioning + Further Reading + Contributing + Ecosystem Vision (small/lean)

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: 3 surgical edits: (1) Quick Start §102-149 47 lines → ~18 lines bullet-form (preserve 3 commands + Berthier walkthrough + persona-path links; cut narrative scaffolding); (2) Working with AI Agents §289-323 36 lines → ~7 lines (preserve human-agent collaboration claim + link to CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/Obsidian Git; cut all subsections — they belong in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md per SO #7); (3) Architecture Reference §370-398 30 lines → ~4 lines (preserve link to spec.md + adna_design.md; cut subsection details — duplicates spec). Discriminator Pattern + Triad intro NOT trimmed this cycle (defer to spec via separate motion later; protect canonical-content ceiling). Expected total reduction: -82 lines net → 364 ± 8 lines.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A on each of the 3 planned edits + the 2 anti-target preservations — 4 D14-bound personas vs 5 because OSS Maintainer joins at cross-vault / upstream-pattern cycles (128 + 129); README polish is single-vault scope
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style (voice + tone) + Q2 Clarity (newcomer-first comprehensibility) + Q3 Conciseness (5-lens pass) + Q4 Bloat (paragraph-level + section-level) + Q5 Comprehension (newcomer time-to-first-success); each persona reads writing-guidelines.mdx §1 clarity-checklist before scoring

persona_consensus.ux_writer: Quick Start tightening — wall-of-text narrative → 4-block scan structure (bash + paragraph + bash + paragraph + bash + paragraph + closing link-pointer) — improves both voice and scannability. Persona-path links route at decision-point ('No Obsidian / No AI agent') instead of buried in callout blocks. Working with AI Agents collapse from 6-subsection wall to 2-paragraph link-summary preserves the 'human-agent collaboration' core claim while routing protocol detail to its canonical home (CLAUDE.md). Architecture Reference 30 → 4 line collapse is the right call — it's pure spec material. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Time-to-first-success improved: Quick Start now scannable in 30 seconds vs 2-3 minutes of wall-of-text parsing. The 3 commands (mkdir + git clone + cd && ./setup.sh) collapse the prior '1./2./3.' numbered scaffolding without losing the procedure. Berthier mention preserved (key claim — there's an agent that walks you through it). Persona-routing sentence at end (`get-started`/`agent_first_guide`/`migration_guide`) catches the 'I'm not using Obsidian / I'm not using AI' newcomer at the right moment. Working with AI Agents collapse means newcomer doesn't waste cognitive load on agent-protocol-narrative they don't need at minute 2. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.information_architect: Content-class routing improved: agent-onboarding material relocated to its canonical home (CLAUDE.md auto-loaded; AGENTS.md per-directory); reference material relocated to spec.md + adna_design.md. README now carries first-contact-only material with link-pointers to canonical homes. Cross-doc link integrity verified — #quick-start anchor preserved at the section heading, so all 5 external references (agent-first-guide.mdx + reading-guide.mdx + migration-guide.mdx + standard_reading_guide.md + migration_guide.md + agent_first_guide.md) continue to resolve. No README self-references broken (#extending-the-ontology + #further-reading both preserved). Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.visual_designer: Visual hierarchy preserved + improved: tighter Quick Start gives more whitespace + scannable code-block-then-prose-then-code-block-then-prose rhythm vs prior wall-of-text. Persona-path link sentence at end of Quick Start serves as visual decision-point. Working with AI Agents 2-paragraph collapse maintains visual separation of the human-agent collaboration claim. Architecture Reference 4-line collapse is dense but appropriate for pure-pointer content. Recommendation for cycle 127: add ToC + section markers per M5.0 §3 D14 row (scan-affordance pass); not in cycle 121 scope but flagged for cycle 127. Score 4.5/5.0.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 4/4 personas approve. Aggregate Q&A: 4.5/5.0. All 5 dimensions (Style + Clarity + Conciseness + Bloat + Comprehension) hit 4.5+ verdict. Implementation: 3 sequential Edit tool calls (Quick Start replacement; Working with AI Agents replacement; Architecture Reference replacement). Each edit is precise old_string → new_string replacement; no whitespace-sensitive collisions. Single binary commit at Step-4 close per skill_iii_cycle cadence.

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — D14 text-only end-to-end per mission spec hard constraint #12; cycles 125-126 reuse D11 section icons (no new gen); cycle 121 README polish is text-only.
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.d13_substrate_dependency_disposition: N/A at cycle 121 (D13 substrate dependency lives at cycles 125-126 per mission spec scope; cycle 121 is README anchor cycle).

files_modified: aDNA.aDNA/README.md (3 surgical edits: Quick Start §102-148 47 lines → 18 lines bullet-form + persona-path link sentence; Working with AI Agents §289-322 34 lines → 5 lines link-summary preserving collaboration claim + routing to CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md + Obsidian Git; Architecture Reference §370-397 28 lines → 3 lines link-summary preserving routing to spec.md + adna_design.md)
step_4_implement.implementation_notes: Single binary commit cycle per skill_iii_cycle cadence. Edit tool used with precise old_string → new_string replacement; no whitespace conflicts; no anchor-link breakage (verified via post-edit grep). Bullet-form Quick Start preserves the 3 install commands + Berthier walkthrough + persona-path routing in compressed form. Working with AI Agents preserves the load-bearing 'human-agent collaboration' framing + routes protocol detail to canonical homes. Architecture Reference becomes a 3-line link-summary acknowledging that governance + collision-prevention + compute-tiers belong in the spec, not the README. Discriminator Pattern + Triad intro NOT touched this cycle (canonical-content ceiling protection).

intra_README_anchors_preserved: #quick-start (heading preserved as `## Quick Start` at the polished bullet-form section — 5 cross-doc references continue to resolve)

post_change_artifacts: aDNA.aDNA/README.md = 368 lines (was 446); 17.5% reduction; all 22 headings preserved as section anchors; all 5 cross-doc references to #quick-start preserved

step_6_validate.method: 5-lens conciseness pass per writing-guidelines.mdx §4 + content-class ceiling verification per AC #6 + persona post-change scoring + link integrity grep

persona_specific_post_change_notes.ux_writer: Voice tightened across 3 surfaces; persona-path routing sentence in Quick Start serves as decision-point closer.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: Quick Start scannable in ~30 seconds vs prior ~2-3 minutes; 3 install commands + Berthier walkthrough + persona-routing preserved.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.information_architect: Content-class routing improved: agent-onboarding → CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md; reference → spec.md. Cross-doc link integrity preserved (5 external #quick-start references continue to resolve).
persona_specific_post_change_notes.visual_designer: Visual hierarchy preserved; tighter section blocks improve scannability. ToC + section-marker pass flagged for cycle 127.

Pre-edit Working with AI Agents subsection wall (5 subsection headers + 5 narrative paragraphs) addressed via 2-paragraph link-summary collapse.

Post-edit: no paragraph exceeds 4 sentences; no subsection exceeds 8 lines (except FAQ which is intentional Q&A format).

Anti-target preservations (60 Seconds + Problem + Personas + Triad Question Test + FAQ) carry their pre-existing clarity-checklist pass-status forward unchanged.

continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_5_reference_collection_scan_reminde: ENGAGED — Architecture Reference 30-line collapse explicitly routes to `what/docs/adna_standard.md` + `what/docs/adna_design.md` (reference-collection scan); Working with AI Agents routes to `CLAUDE.md` + `AGENTS.md` (governance-collection); persona-path closer in Quick Start routes to `get-started` + `agent_first_guide` + `migration_guide` (adopter-conversion collection). README now serves as router-to-canonical-homes for non-first-contact material.

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance: ADR-025 (III-Decadal Coordination) + ADR-026 (Ledger-Observation-as-Shared-Primitive) + M5.5 AC #6 (content_class_declaration NEW field)
step_7_record_iii_result.cycle_outcome_summary: README.md 446 → 368 lines (17.5% reduction; in 5-20% canonical-content ceiling). 4/4 personas (UX Writer + Newcomer Stress-Tester + Information Architect + Visual Designer) score 4.5/5.0 aggregate across 9 dimensions. 3 surgical edits: Quick Start tightened + Working with AI Agents collapsed to link-summary + Architecture Reference collapsed to link-summary. Zero anchor-link breakage; all 5 cross-doc #quick-start references preserved. 1st canonical D14 cycle JSON sub-shape (text-only-canonical-content + content_class_declaration NEW field). Single binary commit per skill_iii_cycle cadence. Image-gen $0.00; cumulative v8 P5 ledger unchanged at $1.72 of $50.
